title: Who we are
subtitle: Corporate structure, governance and execution focused on control, traceability and project protection.
intro: PITLANE is built on a business foundation: with a defined legal architecture, milestone-based execution and a control framework designed to protect the long-term value of the project.

cards.title: Holding and unit-based structure
cards.text: The group is structured under PLN Global Assets, S.L and organized into specialized companies by activity line. This approach separates risks, enables co-investment by vehicle and facilitates orderly capital entry.

cards.title: Governance and decision-making
cards.text: Strategic control remains with the founders to ensure continuity, coherence and execution speed. Key decisions are structured through corporate governance and internal control rules.

cards.title: Execution through verifiable milestones
cards.text: The roadmap is managed through measurable objectives. Each stage is validated with concrete deliverables that reduce uncertainty and increase project value before moving forward.

lists.title: Protection and risk separation
items: Separate entities per unit to limit cross-exposure.
Control framework to prevent deadlocks and maintain operational capacity.
Structure prepared for co-investment and strategic agreements.

lists.title: Investor transparency
items: Periodic updates on project status and milestones.
Structured communication on progress, planning and execution.
Access to documentation and reporting within the defined framework.

lists.title: Economic participation
items: Investors participate through defined economic rights.
Management control is not transferred, preserving leadership stability.
The goal is to align returns with execution without operational interference.

closing: This model prioritizes control, clarity and protection: a corporate foundation designed to execute, scale and sustain value over time.
